markets.primary_market: Naples, Fort Myers, Cape Coral, Bonita Springs

brand.notes: #00003E (near-black deep navy) is CB's primary CSS color — appears as background on hero and nav. #D50000 (bright red) used as CTA/accent color. Classic CB brand: deep navy + white + red. The SWFL CB entity is Coldwell Banker Realty — same brand system.
